title: Active → Passive
description: Соотнеси активное предложение с правильным пассивным вариантом в том же времени.

pairs.explain: Past Simple → Past Simple passive: was/were + V3. Объект (the bridge) становится subject, агент (they) опускается.

pairs.right: This play was written by Shakespeare.
pairs.explain: Past Simple passive с by + agent: автор важен, поэтому Shakespeare остаётся через by.
Present Continuous → Present Continuous passive: is/are + being + V3. Workers опускаются как очевидные.
Present Perfect → Present Perfect passive: has/have + been + V3. Someone в пассиве обычно опускается.

pairs.left: They will announce the results on Monday.
pairs.right: The results will be announced on Monday.
pairs.explain: Future Simple → Future Simple passive: will + be + V3. They опускается.
Модальный пассив: must + be + V3. После любого модального — be, потом V3.
Пассив с двумя дополнениями: получатель (me → I) становится subject. Вариант «A book was given to me» тоже возможен, но реже.
Present Continuous passive с множественным subject: are + being + V3.

pairs.left: The team had finished the report before the call.
pairs.right: The report had been finished before the call.
pairs.explain: Past Perfect → Past Perfect passive: had + been + V3. Действие до момента в прошлом.

pairs.left: They will have completed the project by Friday.
pairs.right: The project will have been completed by Friday.
pairs.explain: Future Perfect → Future Perfect passive: will + have + been + V3. Маркер by + время.
